subject: A large winged beast perched on a stone pedestal, its body covered in dense red-pink tendrils or fur, a gold medallion at its chest, set against a maze-patterned golden wall
description: A massive creature crouches on a narrow stone ledge or plinth, facing slightly left. Its body is broad and heavy with a vaguely leonine lower form, but its upper body is obscured and wrapped in thick red-pink tendrils or fibrous organic strands. Large dark wings are spread behind it. At the center of its chest hangs a prominent gold medallion with a spiral design. The background is flat and geometric — a golden lattice of rectangular maze-paths covering the entire wall, dimly lit. The creature's face is partially visible: heavy-browed, squared jaw, deeply shadowed eyes.
foreground: winged beast with red tendrils and gold medallion on stone plinth
